title: chore: update app metrics 2026-07-15
author: pollinations-ai[bot]
pr_body_excerpt: Daily automated update of app metrics, health checks, and greenhouse

gist.headline: The greenhouse got measured
gist.blurb: The garden ledger received its daily pass: app metrics, health checks, and greenhouse notes are freshly counted. The bees remain extremely committed to spreadsheets.
gist.summary: Automated daily refresh of apps/APPS.md and apps/GREENHOUSE.md updates community app metrics, health checks, and greenhouse status for 2026-07-15.
gist.impact: Community maintainers have current app-health and greenhouse records to track the growing ecosystem.
gist.visual_concept: A cozy community greenhouse where Polly inspects a clipboard of app-health readings beside code-plants labeled with tiny status lights; the scene represents automated ecosystem monitoring rather than a new product capability.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly, the cute yellow-and-brown striped bee mascot with pink blush, light blue wings, and a tiny gardener visor, checking a clipboard of healthy code-plant metrics inside a warm greenhouse. Lime green (#ecf874) grows prominently through leafy status vines around retro monitors, with soft mint, lavender, peach, and cream gradients; cozy pixel art, 8-bit aesthetic, soft pastel gradients, warm lighting, retro gaming vibes, nostalgic but beautiful.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly, the cute yellow-and-brown striped bee mascot with pink blush, light blue wings, and a tiny gardener visor, checking a clipboard of healthy code-plant metrics inside a warm greenhouse.
